creator: dch@freebsd.org
text: @koobs after a bit of testing using the max screen resolution 2800x1800 I found it's equally slow in OSX as FreeBSD at this resolution. Later in the boot sequence, once you can log in at console, is nice and fast again. If I force a lower resolution the speed is faster, but I don't think this is due to FreeBSD directly. It would be great to see this in 10-STABLE as well if that's a possibility.
